// ========== tags.js ==========
        /**
         * Tags Management Module
         * Handles tag input, rendering, and interactions
         */

// tagsState is defined in state.js

        /**
         * Initialize tags functionality
         */
        function initTags() {
            // Cache tags DOM elements
            tagsState.dom = {
                tagsList: document.getElementById('tags-list'),
                tagsInputField: document.getElementById('tags-input-field')
            };

            // Bind events
            if (tagsState.dom.tagsInputField) {
                tagsState.dom.tagsInputField.addEventListener('keydown', _handleTagsInputKeyDown);
                tagsState.dom.tagsInputField.addEventListener('blur', _handleTagsInputBlur);
            }

            if (tagsState.dom.tagsList) {
                tagsState.dom.tagsList.addEventListener('click', _handleTagsListClick);
            }

            _renderTags();
        }

        function _renderTags() {
            const dom = tagsState.dom;
            if (!dom.tagsList) return;

            dom.tagsList.innerHTML = '';
            tagsState.currentTags.forEach(tag => {
                const tagEl = document.createElement('li');
                tagEl.className = 'tag-pill';
                tagEl.innerHTML = `${tag}<button class="remove-tag" data-tag="${tag}">×</button>`;
                dom.tagsList.appendChild(tagEl);
            });

            // Hide placeholder when tags exist
            if (dom.tagsInputField) {
                dom.tagsInputField.placeholder = tagsState.currentTags.length > 0 ? '' : 'Add a tag';
            }
        }

        function _addTag(tagString) {
            const tag = tagString.trim();
            if (tag && !tagsState.currentTags.includes(tag)) {
                tagsState.currentTags.push(tag);
                _renderTags();
                // Auto-save tags (separate from main config save)
                _autoSaveTags();
            }
        }

        function _removeTag(tagString) {
            const tag = tagString.trim();
            tagsState.currentTags = tagsState.currentTags.filter(t => t !== tag);
            _renderTags();
            // Auto-save tags (separate from main config save)
            _autoSaveTags();
        }

        /**
         * Auto-save tags to host
         */
        function _autoSaveTags() {
            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                window.myop_cta_handler('update_tags', {
                    tags: tagsState.currentTags
                });
            }
        }

        function _handleTagsInputKeyDown(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ',') {
                e.preventDefault();
                _addTag(e.target.value);
                e.target.value = '';
            }
        }

        function _handleTagsInputBlur(e) {
            _addTag(e.target.value);
            e.target.value = '';
        }

        function _handleTagsListClick(e) {
            if (e.target.classList.contains('remove-tag')) {
                const tag = e.target.dataset.tag;
                _removeTag(tag);
            }
        }

        /**
         * Get current tags
         * @returns {Array<string>} Current tags array
         */
        function getCurrentTags() {
            return tagsState.currentTags;
        }

        /**
         * Set tags from external source
         * @param {Array<string>} tags - Array of tag strings
         */
        function setTags(tags) {
            if (Array.isArray(tags)) {
                tagsState.currentTags = tags;
                _renderTags();
            }
        }

// ========== End of tags.js ==========

// ========== properties.js ==========
        /**
         * Properties Management Module
         * Handles organization properties input, rendering, and interactions
         */

// propertiesState is defined in state.js

        /**
         * Initialize properties functionality
         */
        function initProperties() {
            // Cache properties DOM elements
            propertiesState.dom = {
                propertiesList: document.getElementById('properties-list'),
                propertiesInputField: document.getElementById('properties-input-field')
            };

            // Bind events
            if (propertiesState.dom.propertiesInputField) {
                propertiesState.dom.propertiesInputField.addEventListener('keydown', _handlePropertiesInputKeyDown);
                propertiesState.dom.propertiesInputField.addEventListener('blur', _handlePropertiesInputBlur);
            }

            if (propertiesState.dom.propertiesList) {
                propertiesState.dom.propertiesList.addEventListener('click', _handlePropertiesListClick);
            }

            _renderProperties();
        }

        /**
         * Check if a property is in use (blocked)
         * @param {string} property - The property to check
         * @returns {boolean} True if the property is in use
         */
        function _isPropertyBlocked(property) {
            // Check if property is used in any segment rules
            for (const segment of configState.savedSegments) {
                if (segment.rules) {
                    for (const rule of segment.rules) {
                        if (rule.property === property) {
                            return true;
                        }
                    }
                }
                // Check if property is used as sticky property
                if (segment.stickyProperties && segment.stickyProperties.includes(property)) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            return false;
        }

        function _renderProperties() {
            const dom = propertiesState.dom;
            if (!dom.propertiesList) return;

            dom.propertiesList.innerHTML = '';
            propertiesState.currentProperties.forEach(prop => {
                const isBlocked = _isPropertyBlocked(prop);
                const propEl = document.createElement('li');
                propEl.className = 'property-pill' + (isBlocked ? ' blocked' : '');

                if (isBlocked) {
                    // Blocked: show only text, tooltip will appear on hover
                    propEl.innerHTML = `<span class="property-text">${prop}</span>`;

                    // Add tooltip functionality for blocked properties
                    propEl.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
                        _showBlockedTooltip(e.currentTarget);
                    });
                    propEl.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                        _hideBlockedTooltip();
                    });
                } else {
                    // Not blocked: show text and delete button (button hidden by CSS until hover)
                    propEl.innerHTML = `
                <span class="property-text">${prop}</span>
                <button class="property-delete-btn" data-property="${prop}">×</button>
            `;
                }
                dom.propertiesList.appendChild(propEl);
            });
        }

        /**
         * Show tooltip for blocked property
         */
        function _showBlockedTooltip(element) {
            // Remove existing tooltip if any
            _hideBlockedTooltip();

            const tooltip = document.createElement('div');
            tooltip.className = 'property-blocked-tooltip';
            tooltip.innerHTML = 'Editing disabled while<br>active in an experience.';
            tooltip.id = 'property-blocked-tooltip';

            document.body.appendChild(tooltip);

            // Position tooltip to the right of the element
            const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
            tooltip.style.left = `${rect.right + 8}px`;
            tooltip.style.top = `${rect.top + rect.height / 2}px`;
            tooltip.style.transform = 'translateY(-50%)';
        }

        /**
         * Hide blocked property tooltip
         */
        function _hideBlockedTooltip() {
            const tooltip = document.getElementById('property-blocked-tooltip');
            if (tooltip) {
                tooltip.remove();
            }
        }

        function _addProperty(propertyString) {
            const prop = propertyString.trim();
            if (prop && !propertiesState.currentProperties.includes(prop)) {
                propertiesState.currentProperties.push(prop);
                _renderProperties();
                // Auto-save properties (separate from main config save)
                _autoSaveProperties();
            }
        }

        function _removeProperty(propertyString) {
            const prop = propertyString.trim();

            // Don't remove if blocked
            if (_isPropertyBlocked(prop)) {
                return;
            }

            propertiesState.currentProperties = propertiesState.currentProperties.filter(p => p !== prop);
            _renderProperties();
            // Auto-save properties (separate from main config save)
            _autoSaveProperties();
        }

        /**
         * Auto-save properties to host
         */
        function _autoSaveProperties() {
            if (typeof window.myop_cta_handler === 'function') {
                window.myop_cta_handler('update_properties', {
                    properties: propertiesState.currentProperties
                });
            }
        }

        function _handlePropertiesInputKeyDown(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ',') {
                e.preventDefault();
                _addProperty(e.target.value);
                e.target.value = '';
            }
        }

        function _handlePropertiesInputBlur(e) {
            _addProperty(e.target.value);
            e.target.value = '';
        }

        function _handlePropertiesListClick(e) {
            if (e.target.classList.contains('property-delete-btn')) {
                const prop = e.target.dataset.property;
                _removeProperty(prop);
            }
        }

        /**
         * Get current properties
         * @returns {Array<string>} Current properties array
         */
        function getCurrentProperties() {
            return propertiesState.currentProperties;
        }

        /**
         * Set properties from external source
         * @param {Array<string>} properties - Array of property strings
         */
        function setProperties(properties) {
            if (Array.isArray(properties)) {
                propertiesState.currentProperties = properties;
                _renderProperties();
            }
        }

        /**
         * Re-render properties (called when segments change to update blocked state)
         */
        function refreshProperties() {
            _renderProperties();
        }

// ========== End of properties.js ==========

// ========== segments.js ==========
        /**
         * Segments Module
         * Handles segment configuration, modal, A/B testing, and variant selection
         */

// modalState, elements, and configState are defined in state.js

        /**
         * Show validation error message below input
         * @param {string} errorId - ID of the error message element
         * @param {string} message - Error message to display
         */
        function showValidationError(errorId, message) {
            const errorElement = document.getElementById(errorId);
            if (errorElement) {
                errorElement.textContent = message;
                errorElement.classList.add('show');
            }
        }

        /**
         * Clear all validation errors
         */
        function clearValidationErrors() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.error-message').forEach(el => {
                el.textContent = '';
                el.classList.remove('show');
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.form-input.error').forEach(el => {
                el.classList.remove('error');
            });
        }

        /**
         * Cache DOM elements for segments
         * @param {Object} elementRefs - Object containing DOM element references
         * @param {Object} config - Configuration state object
         */
        function cacheSegmentElements(elementRefs, config) {
            elements = elementRefs;
            configState = config;
        }

        /**
         * Attach segment modal event listeners
         * @param {Object} elementsRef - DOM elements object
         */
        function attachSegmentEventListeners(elementsRef) {
            elements = elementsRef;

            elements.btnAddSegment.addEventListener('click', () => openModal());
            elements.modalClose.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
            elements.modalCancel.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
            elements.modalSave.addEventListener('click', saveSegment);
            elements.modalBtnAddRule.addEventListener('click', addModalRule);
            elements.modalAbToggle.addEventListener('change', toggleModalAb);
            elements.modalAddSplit.addEventListener('click', addSplitVersion);

            // Modal name and description inputs
            elements.modalSegmentName.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                modalState.currentSegment.name = e.target.value;
                // Clear validation error when user starts typing
                if (e.target.value.trim()) {
                    e.target.classList.remove('error');
                    const errorElement = document.getElementById('error-segment-name');
                    if (errorElement) {
                        errorElement.textContent = '';
                        errorElement.classList.remove('show');
                    }
                }
            });
            elements.modalSegmentDescription.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                modalState.currentSegment.description = e.target.value;
            });

            elements.modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (e.target === elements.modal) closeModal();
            });

            document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
                if (e.key === 'Escape' && modalState.isOpen) closeModal();
            });
        }

        /**
         * Open the segment modal for adding or editing
         * @param {string|null} segmentId - Segment ID for editing, null for new
         */
        function openModal(segmentId = null) {
            modalState.isOpen = true;

            if (segmentId) {
                // Edit mode
                modalState.isEditing = true;
                modalState.editingSegmentId = segmentId;
                const segment = configState.savedSegments.find(s => s.id === segmentId);
                if (segment) {
                    modalState.currentSegment = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(segment));
                }
                elements.modalTitle.textContent = 'Edit Segment';
            } else {
                // Add mode
                modalState.isEditing = false;
                modalState.editingSegmentId = null;

                // Use first property from left panel, or empty string if none defined
                const defaultProperty = propertiesState.currentProperties.length > 0
                    ? propertiesState.currentProperties[0]
                    : '';
                modalState.currentSegment = {
                    name: '',
                    description: '',
                    rules: [
                        { id: uid(), property: defaultProperty, operator: '==', value: '' }
                    ],
                    useAb: false,
                    abSplit: {
                        versions: [
                            { id: 'split_1', percentage: 80 },
                            { id: 'split_2', percentage: 20 }
                        ]
                    },
                    stickyProperties: []
                };
                elements.modalTitle.textContent = 'Add Segment';
            }

            // Populate modal
            elements.modalSegmentName.value = modalState.currentSegment.name;
            elements.modalSegmentDescription.value = modalState.currentSegment.description;
            elements.modalAbToggle.checked = modalState.currentSegment.useAb;
            elements.modalAbContent.classList.toggle('active', modalState.currentSegment.useAb);

            renderModalRules();

            if (modalState.currentSegment.useAb) {
                renderModalAbSections();
            }

            elements.modal.classList.add('active');
            elements.modalSegmentName.focus();
        }

        /**
         * Close the segment modal
         */
        function closeModal() {
            modalState.isOpen = false;
            elements.modal.classList.remove('active');
        }

        /**
         * Save the current segment (add or update)
         */
        function saveSegment() {
            // Clear previous errors
            clearValidationErrors();

            // Validation
            if (!modalState.currentSegment.name.trim()) {
                showValidationError('error-segment-name', 'Please enter a segment name');
                elements.modalSegmentName.classList.add('error');
                return;
            }

            // Validate that all rules have values
            const emptyRules = modalState.currentSegment.rules.filter(rule => !rule.value.trim());
            if (emptyRules.length > 0) {
                // Add error class and message to each empty rule input
                emptyRules.forEach(rule => {
                    const input = document.querySelector(`input[data-rule-id="${rule.id}"]`);
                    if (input) {
                        input.classList.add('error');
                        showValidationError(`error-rule-${rule.id}`, 'This field is required');
                    }
                });
                return;
            }

            if (modalState.currentSegment.useAb) {
                const total = modalState.currentSegment.abSplit.versions.reduce((sum, v) => sum + v.percentage, 0);
                if (total !== 100) {
                    // This is already handled by the visual warning
                    return;
                }
            }

            if (modalState.isEditing) {
                // Update existing segment
                const index = configState.savedSegments.findIndex(s => s.id === modalState.editingSegmentId);
                if (index !== -1) {
                    configState.savedSegments[index] = {
                        ...modalState.currentSegment,
                        id: modalState.editingSegmentId
                    };
                }
            } else {
                // Add new segment
                const newSegment = {
                    ...modalState.currentSegment,
                    id: uid()
                };
                configState.savedSegments.push(newSegment);

                // Initialize variant selection for this segment
                configState.segmentVariants[newSegment.id] = {};

                if (newSegment.useAb) {
                    // For A/B testing segments, create structure with versions (storing variant IDs)
                    configState.selectedComponents.forEach(compId => {
                        const comp = configState.availableComponents.find(c => c.id === compId);
                        if (comp && comp.variants && comp.variants.length > 0) {
                            configState.segmentVariants[newSegment.id][compId] = {};
                            newSegment.abSplit.versions.forEach((split, index) => {
                                const variantIndex = Math.min(index, comp.variants.length - 1);
                                // Store variant ID (not name)
                                configState.segmentVariants[newSegment.id][compId][split.id] =
                                    comp.variants[variantIndex].id;
                            });
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    // For non-A/B segments, just set a single variant ID per component
                    configState.selectedComponents.forEach(compId => {
                        const comp = configState.availableComponents.find(c => c.id === compId);
                        if (comp && comp.variants && comp.variants.length > 0) {
                            // Store variant ID (not name)
                            configState.segmentVariants[newSegment.id][compId] = comp.variants[0].id;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }

            closeModal();
            renderSavedSegments();
            renderSegmentVariantSelects();
            refreshProperties(); // Update blocked state for properties used in segments
            markDirty();
        }

        /**
         * Delete a saved segment
         * @param {string} segmentId - The segment ID to delete
         */
        function deleteSegment(segmentId) {
            configState.savedSegments = configState.savedSegments.filter(s => s.id !== segmentId);
            delete configState.segmentVariants[segmentId];
            renderSavedSegments();
            renderSegmentVariantSelects();
            refreshProperties(); // Update blocked state for properties no longer in use
            markDirty();
        }

// ==========================================
// MODAL RULES
// ==========================================

        function addModalRule() {
            // Use first property from left panel, or empty string if none defined
            const defaultProperty = propertiesState.currentProperties.length > 0
                ? propertiesState.currentProperties[0]
                : '';
            modalState.currentSegment.rules.push({
                id: uid(),
                property: defaultProperty,
                operator: '==',
                value: ''
            });
            renderModalRules();
        }

        function removeModalRule(ruleId) {
            modalState.currentSegment.rules = modalState.currentSegment.rules.filter(r => r.id !== ruleId);
            renderModalRules();
        }

        function updateModalRule(ruleId, field, value) {
            const rule = modalState.currentSegment.rules.find(r => r.id === ruleId);
            if (rule) rule[field] = value;
        }

        function renderModalRules() {
            elements.modalSegmentRules.innerHTML = modalState.currentSegment.rules.map(rule => {
                return `
            <div class="segment-rule">
                <div class="segment-rule-prop" id="modal-rule-property-${rule.id}"></div>
                <div class="segment-rule-op" id="modal-rule-operator-${rule.id}"></div>
                <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; flex: 1 1 0%; min-height: 40px;">
                    <input type="text"
                           placeholder="Value"
                           value="${rule.value}"
                           data-rule-id="${rule.id}"
                           data-field="value"
                           class="form-input segment-rule-val">
                    <span class="error-message" id="error-rule-${rule.id}"></span>
                </div>
                <button data-remove-rule="${rule.id}"
                        class="button-icon delete"
                        ${modalState.currentSegment.rules.length <= 1 ? 'disabled' : ''}>
                    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
                        <path d="M13.1667 5.83301V13.833C13.1667 14.1866 13.0262 14.5258 12.7761 14.7758C12.5261 15.0259 12.187 15.1663 11.8333 15.1663H3.83333C3.47971 15.1663 3.14057 15.0259 2.89052 14.7758C2.64048 14.5258 2.5 14.1866 2.5 13.833V5.83301" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
                        <path d="M0.5 3.16699H15.1667" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
                        <path d="M5.16675 3.16667V0.5H10.5001V3.16667" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
                        <path d="M9.83325 7.82324L5.83325 11.8232" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
                        <path d="M9.83325 11.8232L5.83325 7.82324" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-linecap="square"/>
                    </svg>
                </button>
            </div>
        `;
            }).join('');

            // Create dropdowns
            modalState.currentSegment.rules.forEach(rule => {
                const propertyContainer = document.getElementById(`modal-rule-property-${rule.id}`);
                if (propertyContainer) {
                    // Use properties from the left panel (propertiesState) instead of contextProperties
                    const availableProperties = propertiesState.currentProperties.length > 0
                        ? propertiesState.currentProperties
                        : ['Add properties in left panel'];
                    const propertySelect = createCustomSingleSelect(
                        `modal-property-${rule.id}`,
                        availableProperties,
                        rule.property,
                        (value) => updateModalRule(rule.id, 'property', value)
                    );
                    propertyContainer.appendChild(propertySelect);
                }

                const operatorContainer = document.getElementById(`modal-rule-operator-${rule.id}`);
                if (operatorContainer) {
                    const operators = ['==', '!=', '>', '>=', '<', '<=', 'in', 'not in'];
                    const operatorSelect = createCustomSingleSelect(
                        `modal-operator-${rule.id}`,
                        operators,
                        rule.operator,
                        (value) => updateModalRule(rule.id, 'operator', value)
                    );
                    operatorContainer.appendChild(operatorSelect);
                }
            });
        }

// ==========================================
// MODAL A/B TESTING
// ==========================================

        function toggleModalAb() {
            modalState.currentSegment.useAb = elements.modalAbToggle.checked;
            elements.modalAbContent.classList.toggle('active', modalState.currentSegment.useAb);

            if (modalState.currentSegment.useAb) {
                renderModalAbSections();
            }
        }

        function renderModalAbSections() {
            renderModalGlobalSplit();
            renderModalStickyProperties();
        }

        function renderModalGlobalSplit() {
            const split = modalState.currentSegment.abSplit;

            elements.modalGlobalSplitVersions.innerHTML = split.versions.map((v, index) => `
        <div class="ab-version-item">
            <button class="ab-version-remove"
                    data-remove-split="${v.id}"
                    ${split.versions.length <= 2 ? 'disabled' : ''}>
                <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                    <path d="M9 3L3 9M3 3L9 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                </svg>
            </button>
            <div class="ab-version-label">Group ${String.fromCharCode(65 + index)}</div>
            <div class="ab-percentage-wrapper">
                <input type="number"
                       placeholder="0.1"
                       min="0.1"
                       max="100"
                       maxlength="3"
                       value="${v.percentage}"
                       data-split-id="${v.id}"
                       class="ab-version-percentage-input"
                       style="width: auto;">
                <span class="ab-percentage-label">%</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    `).join('');

            updateModalSplitTotal();
        }

        function updateSplitPercentage(splitId, percentage) {
            const version = modalState.currentSegment.abSplit.versions.find(v => v.id === splitId);
            if (version) {
                version.percentage = percentage;
                updateModalSplitTotal();
            }
        }

        function addSplitVersion() {
            const split = modalState.currentSegment.abSplit;
            const currentTotal = split.versions.reduce((sum, v) => sum + v.percentage, 0);
            const remainingPercentage = Math.max(0, 100 - currentTotal);

            const newSplitId = `split_${split.versions.length + 1}`;
            split.versions.push({
                id: newSplitId,
                percentage: remainingPercentage
            });

            renderModalGlobalSplit();
        }

        function removeSplitVersion(splitId) {
            const split = modalState.currentSegment.abSplit;

            // Prevent deletion if only 2 groups remain
            if (split.versions.length <= 2) {
                return;
            }

            split.versions = split.versions.filter(v => v.id !== splitId);

            renderModalGlobalSplit();
        }

        function updateModalSplitTotal() {
            const total = modalState.currentSegment.abSplit.versions.reduce((sum, v) => sum + v.percentage, 0);
            elements.modalSplitTotal.textContent = `${total}%`;

            if (total !== 100) {
                elements.modalSplitWarning.classList.add('show');
            } else {
                elements.modalSplitWarning.classList.remove('show');
            }
        }

// ==========================================
// MODAL STICKY PROPERTIES
// ==========================================

        function renderModalStickyProperties() {
            const stickyProps = modalState.currentSegment.stickyProperties;

            elements.modalStickyCount.textContent = stickyProps.length === 0
                ? '(none selected)'

                </svg>

    `).join('');

            // Use properties from the left panel instead of contextProperties

                </svg>
            </button>
            <div class="sticky-dropdown" data-sticky-dropdown="modal" style="display: none;">
                ${availableProps.map(prop => `
                    <div class="custom-select-option" data-add-sticky-prop="${prop}">
                        ${prop}
                    </div>
                `).join('')}
            </div>
        </div>

            elements.modalStickyProperties.innerHTML = labelsHTML + dropdownHTML;

        function renderSegmentVariantSelects() {
            // Hide the entire card if there are no segments
            if (configState.savedSegments.length === 0) {
                if (elements.variantsSelectionCard) elements.variantsSelectionCard.style.display = 'none';
                return;
            }

            // Show the Variants Selection card
            if (elements.variantsSelectionCard) elements.variantsSelectionCard.style.display = 'block';
            const firstComponentId = configState.selectedComponents[0];

            // Global component tabs at the top
            const globalTabsHtml = configState.selectedComponents.length > 0 ? `
        <div class="component-tabs" id="global-component-tabs">
            ${configState.selectedComponents.map(compId => {
                const comp = configState.availableComponents.find(c => c.id === compId);
                if (!comp) return '';
                return `<button class="component-tab ${compId === firstComponentId ? 'active' : ''}" data-global-tab="${compId}">${comp.name}</button>`;
            }).join('')}
        </div>
    ` : '';

            // Segments with content per component
            const segmentsHtml = configState.savedSegments.map(segment => {

                    return `

                        <span class="segment-card-badge">A/B Testing</span>

                                                <div class="ab-group-percentage">

                                                </div>

                            </div>

                    return `
                <div class="segment-variant-section" data-segment-variant="${segment.id}">
                    <div class="segment-variant-header">
                        <div class="segment-variant-title">${segment.name}</div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Tab Content per component -->
                    ${configState.selectedComponents.map(compId => {
                        const comp = configState.availableComponents.find(c => c.id === compId);
                        if (!comp) return '';

                        const selectId = `segment-${segment.id}-comp-${compId}`;
                        return `
                            <div class="component-ab-section ${compId === firstComponentId ? 'active' : ''}" data-segment-content="${segment.id}" data-component-content="${compId}">
                                <div class="form-group">
                                    <label class="form-label">Select Variant</label>
                                    <div id="${selectId}"></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        `;
                    }).join('')}
                </div>
            `;
                }
            }).join('');

            // Fallback section - only show when there are components AND at least one segment
            const fallbackHtml = (configState.selectedComponents.length > 0 && configState.savedSegments.length > 0) ? `
        <div class="segment-variant-section fallback-section">
            <div class="segment-variant-header">
                <div class="segment-variant-title" title="Select default variant for users outside defined segments">Fallback</div>
            </div>

            <!-- Tab Content per component -->
            ${configState.selectedComponents.map(compId => {
                const comp = configState.availableComponents.find(c => c.id === compId);
                if (!comp) return '';

                const selectId = `fallback-comp-${compId}`;
                return `
                    <div class="component-ab-section ${compId === firstComponentId ? 'active' : ''}" data-segment-content="fallback" data-component-content="${compId}">
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <label class="form-label">Select Variant</label>
                            <div id="${selectId}"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }).join('')}
        </div>
    ` : '';

            // Combine global tabs + segments + fallback
            elements.segmentVariantSelects.innerHTML = globalTabsHtml + segmentsHtml + fallbackHtml;

            // Attach global tab click handlers
            document.querySelectorAll('[data-global-tab]').forEach(tab => {
                tab.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    const componentId = tab.dataset.globalTab;

                    // Deactivate all global tabs
                    document.querySelectorAll('[data-global-tab]').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
                    // Activate clicked tab
                    tab.classList.add('active');

                    // Switch content for ALL segments
                    document.querySelectorAll('[data-segment-content]').forEach(content => {
                        content.classList.remove('active');
                    });
                    document.querySelectorAll(`[data-component-content="${componentId}"]`).forEach(content => {
                        content.classList.add('active');
                    });
                });
            });

            // Now create the custom selects
            // NOTE: variants are now [{id, name}] - display names but store IDs
            configState.savedSegments.forEach(segment => {
                configState.selectedComponents.forEach(compId => {
                    const comp = configState.availableComponents.find(c => c.id === compId);
                    if (!comp || !comp.variants || comp.variants.length === 0) return;

                    // Get variant names for display
                    const variantNames = comp.variants.map(v => v.name);

                    if (segment.useAb) {
                        // Create select for each A/B version
                        segment.abSplit.versions.forEach(split => {
                            const selectId = `segment-${segment.id}-comp-${compId}-split-${split.id}`;
                            const container = document.getElementById(selectId);
                            if (container) {
                                // Get current variant ID and find its name
                                const currentVariantId = configState.segmentVariants[segment.id]?.[compId]?.[split.id] || comp.variants[0].id;
                                const currentVariant = comp.variants.find(v => v.id === currentVariantId);
                                const currentVariantName = currentVariant ? currentVariant.name : variantNames[0];

                                const select = createCustomSingleSelect(
                                    selectId,
                                    variantNames,
                                    currentVariantName,
                                    (selectedName) => {
                                        // Find variant ID by name and store the ID
                                        const variant = comp.variants.find(v => v.name === selectedName);
                                        if (variant) {
                                            if (!configState.segmentVariants[segment.id]) {
                                                configState.segmentVariants[segment.id] = {};
                                            }
                                            if (!configState.segmentVariants[segment.id][compId]) {
                                                configState.segmentVariants[segment.id][compId] = {};
                                            }
                                            configState.segmentVariants[segment.id][compId][split.id] = variant.id;
                                            markDirty();
                                        }
                                    }
                                );
                                container.appendChild(select);
                            }
                        });
                    } else {
                        // Create single select for non-A/B
                        const selectId = `segment-${segment.id}-comp-${compId}`;
                        const container = document.getElementById(selectId);
                        if (container) {
                            // Get current variant ID and find its name
                            const currentVariantId = configState.segmentVariants[segment.id]?.[compId] || comp.variants[0].id;
                            const currentVariant = comp.variants.find(v => v.id === currentVariantId);
                            const currentVariantName = currentVariant ? currentVariant.name : variantNames[0];

                            const select = createCustomSingleSelect(
                                selectId,
                                variantNames,
                                currentVariantName,
                                (selectedName) => {
                                    // Find variant ID by name and store the ID
                                    const variant = comp.variants.find(v => v.name === selectedName);
                                    if (variant) {
                                        if (!configState.segmentVariants[segment.id]) {
                                            configState.segmentVariants[segment.id] = {};
                                        }
                                        configState.segmentVariants[segment.id][compId] = variant.id;
                                        markDirty();
                                    }
                                }
                            );
                            container.appendChild(select);
                        }
                    }
                });
            });

            // Create fallback selects
            // NOTE: variants are now [{id, name}] - display names but store IDs
            configState.selectedComponents.forEach(compId => {
                const comp = configState.availableComponents.find(c => c.id === compId);
                if (!comp || !comp.variants || comp.variants.length === 0) return;

                const selectId = `fallback-comp-${compId}`;
                const container = document.getElementById(selectId);
                if (container) {
                    // Initialize fallback with first variant ID if not set
                    if (!configState.fallback[compId]) {
                        configState.fallback[compId] = comp.variants[0].id;
                    }

                    // Get variant names for display
                    const variantNames = comp.variants.map(v => v.name);
                    // Find name for current variant ID
                    const currentVariantId = configState.fallback[compId];
                    const currentVariant = comp.variants.find(v => v.id === currentVariantId);
                    const currentVariantName = currentVariant ? currentVariant.name : variantNames[0];

                    const select = createCustomSingleSelect(
                        selectId,
                        variantNames,
                        currentVariantName,
                        (selectedName) => {
                            // Find variant ID by name and store the ID
                            const variant = comp.variants.find(v => v.name === selectedName);
                            if (variant) {
                                configState.fallback[compId] = variant.id;
                            }
                        }
                    );
                    container.appendChild(select);
                }
            });
        }

// ==========================================
// MODAL EVENT DELEGATION

        function initModalEventDelegation() {
            // Modal input delegation
            elements.modal.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                const target = e.target;

                if (target.id === 'modal-segment-name') {
                    modalState.currentSegment.name = target.value;
                } else if (target.id === 'modal-segment-description') {
                    modalState.currentSegment.description = target.value;
                } else if (target.dataset.ruleId && target.dataset.field) {
                    updateModalRule(target.dataset.ruleId, target.dataset.field, target.value);
                    // Clear validation error when user starts typing in rule value
                    if (target.value.trim()) {
                        target.classList.remove('error');
                        const errorElement = document.getElementById(`error-rule-${target.dataset.ruleId}`);
                        if (errorElement) {
                            errorElement.textContent = '';
                            errorElement.classList.remove('show');
                        }
                    }
                } else if (target.type === 'number' && target.dataset.splitId) {
                    updateSplitPercentage(target.dataset.splitId, parseInt(target.value, 10) || 0);
                }
            });

            // Modal keydown delegation (Enter key handling)
            elements.modal.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
                if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                    const target = e.target;

                    // Handle Enter key on input fields
                    if (target.tagName === 'INPUT' && target.type === 'text') {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        target.blur();

                        // Add filled state class
                        if (target.value.trim() !== '') {
                            target.classList.add('filled');
                        } else {
                            target.classList.remove('filled');
                        }
                    }
                }
            });

            // Modal button delegation
            elements.modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const target = e.target.closest('button');
                if (!target) return;

                if (target.dataset.removeRule) {
                    removeModalRule(target.dataset.removeRule);
                } else if (target.dataset.removeSplit) {
                    removeSplitVersion(target.dataset.removeSplit);
                } else if (target.dataset.stickyAdd) {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    const dropdown = document.querySelector('[data-sticky-dropdown="modal"]');
                    if (dropdown) {
                        const isVisible = dropdown.style.display === 'block';
                        dropdown.style.display = isVisible ? 'none' : 'block';
                    }
                } else if (target.dataset.removeSticky) {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    const prop = target.dataset.removeSticky;
                    const index = modalState.currentSegment.stickyProperties.indexOf(prop);
                    if (index > -1) {
                        modalState.currentSegment.stickyProperties.splice(index, 1);
                        renderModalStickyProperties();
                    }
                }
            });

            // Sticky property selection
            elements.modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const option = e.target.closest('[data-add-sticky-prop]');
                if (!option) return;

                e.stopPropagation();
                const prop = option.dataset.addStickyProp;

                if (!modalState.currentSegment.stickyProperties.includes(prop)) {
                    modalState.currentSegment.stickyProperties.push(prop);
                    renderModalStickyProperties();
                }
            });

            // Close dropdown on outside click
            document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (!e.target.closest('.sticky-add-wrapper')) {
                    const dropdown = document.querySelector('[data-sticky-dropdown="modal"]');
                    if (dropdown) {
                        dropdown.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        function initSavedSegmentsEventDelegation() {

                if (!target) return;

                if (target.dataset.editSegment) {

                    deleteSegment(target.dataset.deleteSegment);

        /**
         * Event Handlers Module
         * Contains all event handling and delegation logic
         */

// configState and elements are defined in state.js
        let currentRenderOptions = null;
        let currentSearchInput = null;

        /**
         * Set configuration state reference
         * @param {Object} config - Configuration state object
         * @param {Object} elementsRef - DOM elements object
         */
        function setConfigState(config, elementsRef) {
            configState = config;
            elements = elementsRef;
        }

        /**
         * Initialize main event delegation
         */
        function initEventDelegation() {
            const container = document.getElementById('container');

            // Input event delegation
            container.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                const target = e.target;
                // Segment events are handled by initSegmentEventDelegation()
            });

            // Button clicks delegation
            container.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const target = e.target.closest('button');
                if (!target) return;

                // Remove component pill
                if (target.dataset.removeComponent) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    handleComponentToggle(target.dataset.removeComponent, false);
                    renderComponentSelect();
                    return;
                }

                // Fallback tabs
                if (target.dataset.fallbackTab) {
                    switchFallbackTab(target.dataset.fallbackTab);
                    return;
                }

                // Other segment events are handled by initSegmentEventDelegation()
            });
        }

        /**
         * Render component multiselect dropdown
         */
        function renderComponentSelect() {
            console.log('[renderComponentSelect] Called, availableComponents:', configState.availableComponents?.length);
            elements.componentSelectWrapper.innerHTML = '';

            const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
            wrapper.className = 'custom-select-wrapper';
            wrapper.style.position = 'relative';

            const trigger = document.createElement('div');
            trigger.className = 'custom-select-trigger multiselect';

            // Initial tags rendering
            updateComponentTags(trigger);

            const dropdown = document.createElement('div');
            dropdown.className = 'custom-select-dropdown';

            const searchContainer = document.createElement('div');
            searchContainer.className = 'custom-select-search';
            searchContainer.innerHTML = `
        <div class="custom-select-search-icon">
            <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                <path d="M7 12C9.76142 12 12 9.76142 12 7C12 4.23858 9.76142 2 7 2C4.23858 2 2 4.23858 2 7C2 9.76142 4.23858 12 7 12Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                <path d="M14 14L10.5 10.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
            </svg>
        </div>
        <input type="text" class="custom-select-search-input" placeholder="Search">
    `;

            const optionsContainer = document.createElement('div');
            optionsContainer.className = 'custom-select-options';

            const renderOptions = (searchTerm = '') => {
                console.log('[renderOptions] configState.availableComponents:', configState.availableComponents);
                const filteredComponents = configState.availableComponents.filter(comp =>
                    comp.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) &&
                    !configState.selectedComponents.includes(comp.id)
                );
                console.log('[renderOptions] filteredComponents:', filteredComponents.length);

                if (filteredComponents.length === 0) {
                    optionsContainer.innerHTML = `
                <div class="custom-select-empty-state">
                    There are no components here
                </div>
            `;
                } else {
                    optionsContainer.innerHTML = filteredComponents.map(comp => {
                        return `
                    <div class="custom-select-option" data-component-id="${comp.id}">
                        <span>${comp.name}</span>
                    </div>
                `;
                    }).join('');
                }
            };

            // Store references globally so they can be called from tag removal
            currentRenderOptions = renderOptions;
            const searchInput = searchContainer.querySelector('.custom-select-search-input');
            currentSearchInput = searchInput;

            renderOptions();

            searchInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
                renderOptions(e.target.value);
            });

            optionsContainer.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const optionDiv = e.target.closest('.custom-select-option');
                if (!optionDiv) return;

                e.stopPropagation();
                const compId = optionDiv.dataset.componentId;

                // Add to selected items
                if (!configState.selectedComponents.includes(compId)) {
                    // Process the selection (keep dropdown open for multi-select)
                    handleComponentToggle(compId, true);

                    // Re-render options to remove selected item from list
                    const currentSearchTerm = searchInput.value;
                    renderOptions(currentSearchTerm);

                    // Update tags display
                    updateComponentTags(trigger);
                }
            });

            dropdown.appendChild(searchContainer);
            dropdown.appendChild(optionsContainer);
            wrapper.appendChild(trigger);
            wrapper.appendChild(dropdown);
            elements.componentSelectWrapper.appendChild(wrapper);

            trigger.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                const isOpen = dropdown.classList.contains('open');

                closeAllDropdowns();

                if (!isOpen) {
                    dropdown.classList.add('open');
                    trigger.classList.add('open');
                    searchInput.focus();
                }
            });
        }

        function updateComponentTags(trigger) {
            if (!trigger) return;

            // Clear trigger content
            trigger.innerHTML = '';

            // Add tags for each selected component
            configState.selectedComponents.forEach(compId => {
                const comp = configState.availableComponents.find(c => c.id === compId);
                if (!comp) return;

                const tag = document.createElement('div');
                tag.className = 'selected-item-tag';
                tag.innerHTML = `
            <span>${comp.name}</span>
            <span class="selected-item-remove" data-value="${compId}">
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 15 15" fill="none">
                    <path d="M10.6067 3.53613L3.53564 10.6072" stroke="#0A090A" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                    <path d="M3.53542 3.53613L10.6065 10.6072" stroke="#0A090A" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                </svg>
            </span>
        `;
                trigger.appendChild(tag);

                // Prevent dropdown from opening when clicking on tag
                tag.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                });

                // Remove handler
                tag.querySelector('.selected-item-remove').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();

                    // Remove from selected components
                    handleComponentToggle(compId, false);

                    // Re-render options to show the removed item back in the list
                    if (currentRenderOptions && currentSearchInput) {
                        const currentSearchTerm = currentSearchInput.value;
                        currentRenderOptions(currentSearchTerm);
                    }

                    // Update tags display
                    const currentTrigger = document.querySelector('#component-select-wrapper .custom-select-trigger');
                    if (currentTrigger) {
                        updateComponentTags(currentTrigger);
                    }
                });
            });

            // If no components selected, show placeholder
            if (configState.selectedComponents.length === 0) {
                const placeholder = document.createElement('span');
                placeholder.className = 'custom-select-value placeholder';
                placeholder.textContent = 'Select';
                trigger.appendChild(placeholder);
            }
        }

        function handleComponentToggle(componentId, isSelected) {
            if (isSelected) {
                if (!configState.selectedComponents.includes(componentId)) {
                    configState.selectedComponents.push(componentId);

                    // Trigger CTA to notify host that component was selected (to fetch variants)
                    window.myop_cta_handler('component_selected', { componentId });

                    const comp = configState.availableComponents.find(c => c.id === componentId);
                    // variants is now [{id, name}] array
                    if (comp && comp.variants && comp.variants.length > 0) {
                        // Store variant ID (not name) in fallback
                        configState.fallback[componentId] = comp.variants[0].id;

                        // Initialize segment variants for ALL saved segments
                        configState.savedSegments.forEach(segment => {
                            if (!configState.segmentVariants[segment.id]) {
                                configState.segmentVariants[segment.id] = {};
                            }

                            if (segment.useAb) {
                                // AB mode: initialize with split structure (storing variant IDs)
                                configState.segmentVariants[segment.id][componentId] = {};
                                segment.abSplit.versions.forEach((split, index) => {
                                    const variantIndex = Math.min(index, comp.variants.length - 1);
                                    configState.segmentVariants[segment.id][componentId][split.id] =
                                        comp.variants[variantIndex].id;
                                });
                            } else {
                                // Simple mode: store variant ID
                                configState.segmentVariants[segment.id][componentId] = comp.variants[0].id;
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            } else {
                configState.selectedComponents = configState.selectedComponents.filter(id => id !== componentId);
                // Remove from all saved segments
                configState.savedSegments.forEach(segment => {
                    if (configState.segmentVariants[segment.id]) {
                        delete configState.segmentVariants[segment.id][componentId];
                    }
                });
                delete configState.fallback[componentId];
            }

            // Update tags display in the trigger
            const trigger = elements.componentSelectWrapper.querySelector('.custom-select-trigger');
            if (trigger) {
                updateComponentTags(trigger);
            }

            renderSelectedComponents();
            // Note: renderSegmentVariantSelects() should be called from the main module
            if (window.renderSegmentVariantSelects) {
                window.renderSegmentVariantSelects();
            }
            renderFallbackSelects();

            // Mark state as dirty
            markDirty();
        }

        function renderSelectedComponents() {
            if (configState.selectedComponents.length === 0) {
                if (elements.segmentCard) elements.segmentCard.style.display = 'none';
                if (elements.fallbackCard) elements.fallbackCard.style.display = 'none';
                return;
            }

            if (elements.segmentCard) elements.segmentCard.style.display = 'block';
            if (elements.fallbackCard) elements.fallbackCard.style.display = 'block';
        }// activeFallbackTab is defined in state.js

        function renderFallbackSelects() {
            // Check if fallbackSelects element exists
            if (!elements.fallbackSelects) {
                return;
            }

            if (configState.selectedComponents.length === 0) {
                elements.fallbackSelects.innerHTML = `
            <div class="empty-state">
                <div class="empty-state-text">No components selected</div>
            </div>
        `;
                activeFallbackTab = null;
                return;
            }

            if (!activeFallbackTab || !configState.selectedComponents.includes(activeFallbackTab)) {
                activeFallbackTab = configState.selectedComponents[0];
            }

            const tabsHtml = configState.selectedComponents.map(compId => {
                const comp = configState.availableComponents.find(c => c.id === compId);
                const isActive = compId === activeFallbackTab;
                return `<button class="component-tab ${isActive ? 'active' : ''}" data-fallback-tab="${compId}">${comp.name}</button>`;
            }).join('');

            const fallbackItemsHtml = configState.selectedComponents.map(compId => {
                const comp = configState.availableComponents.find(c => c.id === compId);
                const isActive = compId === activeFallbackTab;
                return `
            <div class="fallback-item ${isActive ? 'active' : ''}" data-fallback-item="${compId}">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label">${comp.name} Fallback Variant</label>
                    <div id="fallback-select-${compId}"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
            }).join('');

            elements.fallbackSelects.innerHTML = `
        <div class="component-tabs">${tabsHtml}</div>
        ${fallbackItemsHtml}
    `;

            configState.selectedComponents.forEach(compId => {
                const container = document.getElementById(`fallback-select-${compId}`);
                if (container) {
                    const comp = configState.availableComponents.find(c => c.id === compId);
                    if (!comp || !comp.variants) return;

                    // Create options array with variant names for display
                    const variantNames = comp.variants.map(v => v.name);
                    // Get current selected variant ID
                    const currentVariantId = configState.fallback[compId] || comp.variants[0]?.id;
                    // Find the name for the current variant ID
                    const currentVariant = comp.variants.find(v => v.id === currentVariantId);
                    const currentVariantName = currentVariant ? currentVariant.name : variantNames[0];

                    const select = createCustomSingleSelect(
                        `fallback-${compId}`,
                        variantNames,
                        currentVariantName,
                        (selectedName) => {
                            // Find variant ID by name and store the ID
                            const variant = comp.variants.find(v => v.name === selectedName);
                            if (variant) {
                                configState.fallback[compId] = variant.id;
                                markDirty();
                            }
                        }
                    );
                    container.appendChild(select);
                }
            });
        }

        function switchFallbackTab(componentId) {
            if (!elements.fallbackSelects) {
                return;
            }

            activeFallbackTab = componentId;

            elements.fallbackSelects.querySelectorAll('[data-fallback-tab]').forEach(tab => {
                tab.classList.toggle('active', tab.dataset.fallbackTab === componentId);
            });

            elements.fallbackSelects.querySelectorAll('.fallback-item').forEach(item => {
                item.classList.toggle('active', item.dataset.fallbackItem === componentId);
            });
        }

        /**
         * Handle save action
         */
        function handleSave() {
            // Set default name if not provided
            if (!configState.experienceName || !configState.experienceName.trim()) {
                configState.experienceName = 'Untitled experience';
                topBarState.experienceName = 'Untitled experience';
                // Update the UI
                const nameInput = document.getElementById('experience-name-display');
                if (nameInput) {
                    nameInput.value = 'Untitled experience';
                }
            }

            if (configState.selectedComponents.length === 0) {
                window.myop_cta_handler('validation_error', {
                    field: 'selectedComponents',
                    message: 'Please select at least one component'
                });
                return;
            }

            // Validate all segments
            for (const segment of configState.savedSegments) {
                if (segment.useAb) {
                    const total = segment.abSplit.versions.reduce((sum, v) => sum + v.percentage, 0);
                    if (total !== 100) {
                        window.myop_cta_handler('validation_error', {
                            field: 'abSplitPercentages',
                            message: `Segment "${segment.name}": A/B split percentages must add up to 100%`
                        });
                        return;
                    }
                }
            }

            // Build config
            // NOTE: componentVariants and fallback now contain variant IDs (not names)
            const config = {
                experienceName: configState.experienceName,
                experienceDescription: configState.experienceDescription,
                components: configState.selectedComponents,
                segments: configState.savedSegments.map(segment => ({
                    id: segment.id,
                    name: segment.name,
                    description: segment.description,
                    rules: segment.rules.map(r => ({
                        property: r.property,
                        operator: r.operator,
                        value: r.value
                    })),
                    useAb: segment.useAb,
                    componentVariants: configState.segmentVariants[segment.id],
                    abSplit: segment.useAb ? segment.abSplit : undefined,
                    stickyProperties: segment.useAb ? segment.stickyProperties : undefined
                })),
                fallback: configState.fallback,
                tags: tagsState.currentTags || []
            };

            // Trigger CTA handler
            window.myop_cta_handler('save_experience', config);

            // Mark as saved and update button states
            markSaved();
        }

        /**
         * Handle cancel action
         */
        function handleCancel() {
            window.myop_cta_handler('cancel', {});
        }

        /**
