// All state, elements, and other modules' functions are already in scope

// elements is defined in state.js

        /**
         * Cache all DOM elements
         */
        function cacheElements() {
            elements = {
                selectedComponents: document.getElementById('selected-components'),
                componentSelectWrapper: document.getElementById('component-select-wrapper'),
                segmentCard: document.getElementById('segment-card'),
                savedSegmentsContainer: document.getElementById('saved-segments-container'),
                emptyState: document.getElementById('empty-state'),
                variantsSelectionCard: document.getElementById('variants-selection-card'),
                segmentVariantsSection: document.getElementById('segment-variants-section'),
                segmentVariantSelects: document.getElementById('segment-variant-selects'),
                btnAddSegment: document.getElementById('btn-add-segment'),
                fallbackCard: document.getElementById('fallback-card'),
                fallbackSelects: document.getElementById('fallback-selects'),

                // Modal elements
                modal: document.getElementById('segment-modal'),
                modalTitle: document.getElementById('modal-title'),
                modalClose: document.getElementById('modal-close'),
                modalSegmentName: document.getElementById('modal-segment-name'),
                modalSegmentDescription: document.getElementById('modal-segment-description'),
                modalSegmentRules: document.getElementById('modal-segment-rules'),
                modalBtnAddRule: document.getElementById('modal-btn-add-rule'),
                modalAbToggle: document.getElementById('modal-ab-toggle'),
                modalAbContent: document.getElementById('modal-ab-content'),
                modalGlobalSplitVersions: document.getElementById('modal-global-split-versions'),
                modalAddSplit: document.getElementById('modal-add-split'),
                modalSplitTotal: document.getElementById('modal-split-total'),
                modalSplitWarning: document.getElementById('modal-split-warning'),
                modalStickyProperties: document.getElementById('modal-sticky-properties'),
                modalStickyCount: document.getElementById('modal-sticky-count'),
                modalCancel: document.getElementById('modal-cancel'),
                modalSave: document.getElementById('modal-save')
            };
        }

        /**
         * Main render function
         */
        function render() {
            // Experience name is now handled in the top bar
            renderComponentSelect();
            renderSelectedComponents();

            if (configState.selectedComponents.length > 0) {
                if (elements.segmentCard) elements.segmentCard.style.display = 'block';
                if (elements.fallbackCard) elements.fallbackCard.style.display = 'block';
                renderSavedSegments();
                renderSegmentVariantSelects();
                renderFallbackSelects();
            } else {
                if (elements.segmentCard) elements.segmentCard.style.display = 'none';
                if (elements.fallbackCard) elements.fallbackCard.style.display = 'none';
            }
        }

// renderSelectedComponents is defined in event-handlers.js

        /**
         * Initialize dynamic placeholder switching for inputs
         * When focused: shows "Enter ..." placeholder
         * When blurred: shows "Untitled ..." placeholder
         */
        function initDynamicPlaceholders() {
            const inputs = document.querySelectorAll('[data-placeholder-default][data-placeholder-focus]');

            inputs.forEach(input => {
                const defaultPlaceholder = input.dataset.placeholderDefault;
                const focusPlaceholder = input.dataset.placeholderFocus;

                input.addEventListener('focus', () => {
                    if (!input.value) {
                        input.placeholder = focusPlaceholder;
                    }
                });

                input.addEventListener('blur', () => {
                    if (!input.value) {
                        input.placeholder = defaultPlaceholder;
                    }
                });
            });
        }

        /**
         * Initialize the entire application
         */
        function initializeApp() {
            // Cache DOM elements
            cacheElements();

            // Initialize top bar
            initTopBar(configState);
            setupTopBarActions(handleSave);

            // Initialize dynamic placeholders for experience/variant name inputs
            initDynamicPlaceholders();

            // Initialize tags
            initTags();

            // Initialize properties
            initProperties();

            // Pass state to modules
            setConfigState(configState, elements);
            cacheSegmentElements(elements, configState);

            // Attach event listeners
            attachSegmentEventListeners(elements);
            initEventDelegation();
            initModalEventDelegation();
            initSavedSegmentsEventDelegation();
            initGlobalDropdownHandler();

            // Initialize accordion
            initAccordion();

            // Initialize collapsible sections in left panel
            initCollapsibleSections();

            // Initialize unsaved changes modal
            initUnsavedChangesModal();

            // Initialize Save button tooltip
            initSaveButtonTooltip();

            // Expose render function globally for event handlers
            window.renderSegmentVariantSelects = renderSegmentVariantSelects;

            // Expose dirty state functions for host integration
            window.hasUnsavedChanges = hasUnsavedChanges;
            window.showUnsavedChangesModal = showUnsavedChangesModal;

            // Initial render
            render();

            // Set initial button states (disabled until data is loaded)
            updateSavePublishButtons();
        }

        /**
         * Initialize accordion functionality (disabled - section always visible)
         */
        function initAccordion() {
            // Accordion behavior removed - "Define the target segment" section is always visible
        }

        /**
         * Initialize collapsible sections in left panel
         */
        function initCollapsibleSections(options = {}) {
            const { expandedByDefault = true } = options;

            document.querySelectorAll('.collapsible-header').forEach(header => {
                // Click handler
                header.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    // Ignore clicks on info icon button - it's hover-only for tooltip
                    if (e.target.closest('.info-icon-btn')) {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        return;
                    }

                    const sectionName = this.dataset.section;
                    const content = document.querySelector(`[data-section-content="${sectionName}"]`);
                    const chevron = this.querySelector('.chevron-icon');

                    if (!content || !chevron) return;

                    if (content.classList.contains('expanded')) {
                        // Collapse
                        content.classList.remove('expanded');
                        chevron.classList.remove('expanded');
                        chevron.classList.add('collapsed');
                    } else {
                        // Expand
                        content.classList.add('expanded');
                        chevron.classList.add('expanded');
                        chevron.classList.remove('collapsed');
                    }
                });

                // Set initial state
                if (expandedByDefault) {
                    const sectionName = header.dataset.section;
                    const content = document.querySelector(`[data-section-content="${sectionName}"]`);
                    const chevron = header.querySelector('.chevron-icon');

                    if (content && chevron) {
                        content.classList.add('expanded');
                        chevron.classList.add('expanded');
                        chevron.classList.remove('collapsed');
                    }
                }
            });

            // Left panel toggle (minimize/expand)
            const leftPanel = document.querySelector('.left-panel');
            const toggleBtn = document.getElementById('left-panel-toggle');

            if (leftPanel && toggleBtn) {
                toggleBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    leftPanel.classList.toggle('minimized');
                });

                // Add tooltip functionality for left panel toggle
                toggleBtn.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                    showLeftPanelTooltip(toggleBtn, leftPanel);
                });

                toggleBtn.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                    hideInfoTooltip();
                });

            }

            // Initialize info icon tooltips
            initInfoTooltips();
        }

        /**
         * Initialize info icon tooltips (hover only)
         */
        function initInfoTooltips() {
            const infoButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.info-icon-btn[data-tooltip]');

            infoButtons.forEach(btn => {
                btn.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                    showInfoTooltip(btn, btn.dataset.tooltip);
                });

                btn.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                    hideInfoTooltip();
                });
            });
        }

        /**
         * Show info tooltip
         */
        function showInfoTooltip(element, text) {
            hideInfoTooltip(); // Remove any existing tooltip

            const tooltip = document.createElement('div');
            tooltip.className = 'info-tooltip';
            tooltip.id = 'info-tooltip';
            tooltip.textContent = text;

            document.body.appendChild(tooltip);

            const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
            tooltip.style.left = `${rect.left + rect.width / 2}px`;
            tooltip.style.top = `${rect.bottom + 6}px`;
            tooltip.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
        }

        /**
         * Hide info tooltip
         */
        function hideInfoTooltip() {
            const tooltip = document.getElementById('info-tooltip');
            if (tooltip) {
                tooltip.style.transitionDelay = '0s';
                tooltip.style.opacity = '0';
                setTimeout(() => {
                    if (tooltip.parentNode) {
                        tooltip.remove();
                    }
                }, 300); // Wait for transition to complete
            }
        }

        /**
         * Show left panel toggle tooltip with dynamic text and positioning
         */
        function showLeftPanelTooltip(element, leftPanel) {
            hideInfoTooltip(); // Remove any existing tooltip

            const isMinimized = leftPanel.classList.contains('minimized');
            const text = isMinimized ? 'Open left panel' : 'Close left panel';

            const tooltip = document.createElement('div');
            tooltip.className = 'info-tooltip';
            tooltip.id = 'info-tooltip';
            tooltip.textContent = text;

            document.body.appendChild(tooltip);

            const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();

            if (isMinimized) {
                // Position to the right of the button when minimized
                tooltip.style.left = `${rect.right + 8}px`;
                tooltip.style.top = `${rect.top + rect.height / 2}px`;
                tooltip.style.transform = 'translateY(-50%)';
            } else {
                // Position below the button when expanded
                tooltip.style.left = `${rect.left + rect.width / 2}px`;
                tooltip.style.top = `${rect.bottom + 6}px`;
                tooltip.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
            }

            // Trigger fade-in animation
            requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                tooltip.style.opacity = '1';
            });
        }

        /**
         * Initialize unsaved changes modal close button
         */
        function initUnsavedChangesModal() {
            const closeBtn = document.getElementById('unsaved-modal-close');
            const modal = document.getElementById('unsaved-changes-modal');

            if (closeBtn && modal) {
                closeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    modal.classList.remove('active');
                });
            }
        }

// ==========================================
// PUBLIC API - MYOP INTERFACE
// ==========================================

        /**
         * Initialize the interface with config data
         * @param {Object} data - Full configuration object
         */
        window.myop_init_interface = function (data) {
            console.log('[myop_init_interface] Called with data:', data);

            if (!data) {
                console.warn('myop_init_interface: No data provided');
                return;
            }

            // Track if this is a full initialization (not just a component variants update)
            const isFullInit = data.availableComponents !== undefined &&
                data.selectedComponents !== undefined;

            // Update state with provided data
            if (data.experienceId !== undefined) {
                topBarState.experienceId = data.experienceId || 'exp-new';
            }
            if (data.experienceName !== undefined) {
                configState.experienceName = data.experienceName;
                topBarState.experienceName = data.experienceName || 'Untitled experience...';
                // Update the DOM to reflect the new name
                if (topBarState.dom && topBarState.dom.experienceNameDisplay) {
                    topBarState.dom.experienceNameDisplay.value = topBarState.experienceName;
                }
            }
            if (data.experienceDescription !== undefined) configState.experienceDescription = data.experienceDescription;

            // Handle experiences list (for dropdown)
            if (data.experiences !== undefined) {
                topBarState.experiences = data.experiences;
            }

            // Handle variants
            if (data.variants !== undefined) {
                topBarState.variants = data.variants;
            }
            if (data.currentVariant !== undefined) {
                topBarState.selectedVariant = data.currentVariant;
            }
            if (data.availableComponents !== undefined) {
                configState.availableComponents = data.availableComponents;
                console.log('[myop_init_interface] Set availableComponents:', configState.availableComponents.length, 'components');
                // Log components with variants
                const componentsWithVariants = configState.availableComponents.filter(c => c.variants && c.variants.length > 0);
                console.log('[myop_init_interface] Components with variants:', componentsWithVariants.map(c => ({ id: c.id, name: c.name, variants: c.variants })));
            }
            if (data.selectedComponents !== undefined) {
                configState.selectedComponents = data.selectedComponents;
                console.log('[myop_init_interface] Set selectedComponents:', configState.selectedComponents);
            }
            if (data.contextProperties !== undefined) configState.contextProperties = data.contextProperties;
            if (data.savedSegments !== undefined) configState.savedSegments = data.savedSegments;
            if (data.segmentVariants !== undefined) configState.segmentVariants = data.segmentVariants;
            if (data.fallback !== undefined) configState.fallback = data.fallback;
            if (data.releases !== undefined) configState.releases = data.releases;

            // Handle tags if provided
            if (data.tags !== undefined) {
                setTags(data.tags);
            }

            // Handle save success notification from host
            if (data.savedSuccessfully === true) {
                console.log('[myop_init_interface] Save successful, marking as saved');
                markSaved();
                return; // Don't re-render, just update state
            }

            // Set up editor state on full initialization (only on first load, not on variant updates)
            // Check if this is the FIRST init (no snapshot exists yet) vs a subsequent update
            const isFirstInit = isFullInit && editorState.initialSnapshot === null;

            if (isFirstInit) {
                // Determine if this is a released version (has releases and current variant is in releases)
                editorState.isReleased = Array.isArray(configState.releases) && configState.releases.length > 0;

                // Track if this is an existing experience (has an ID from server)
                editorState.isExistingExperience = data.experienceId !== undefined && data.experienceId !== null && data.experienceId !== '';

                // For new experiences, not saved yet
                // For existing experiences loaded from server, consider them saved
                editorState.isSaved = editorState.isExistingExperience &&
                    data.selectedComponents && data.selectedComponents.length > 0;

                // Create initial snapshot for dirty tracking
                editorState.initialSnapshot = createConfigSnapshot();
                editorState.isDirty = false;

                console.log('[myop_init_interface] Editor state (first init):', editorState);
            } else if (isFullInit) {
                // Subsequent updates (e.g., after fetching variants) - don't reset dirty state
                console.log('[myop_init_interface] Subsequent update - preserving dirty state:', editorState.isDirty);
            }

            console.log('[myop_init_interface] configState.availableComponents before render:', configState.availableComponents);

            // Re-render the interface
            render();

            // Update button states
            updateSavePublishButtons();

            console.log('[myop_init_interface] Render complete');
        };

        /**
         * Handle all CTA actions from the interface
         * @param {string} action_id - The action identifier
         * @param {Object} payload - The action payload data
         */
        window.myop_cta_handler = function (action_id, payload) {
            const logEntry = {
                timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
                action_id: action_id,
                payload: payload
            };

            console.log('CTA Handler:', logEntry);

            // You can add specific handling logic here based on action_id
            switch (action_id) {
                case 'save_experience':
                    console.log('Saving experience:', payload);
                    break;
                case 'cancel':
                    console.log('Cancelled');
                    break;
                case 'validation_error':
                    console.error('Validation error:', payload.message);
                    alert(payload.message);
                    break;
                case 'update_tags':
                    console.log('Tags updated:', payload.tags);
                    break;
                default:
                    break;
            }
        };

// ==========================================
// AUTO-INITIALIZE
// ==========================================

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initializeApp);
        } else {
            initializeApp();
        }

// Export for testing or external use

// ========== End of initialization.js ==========

})();
</script>

</body>
</html>
